examples.title: Algorithm: If Statement
examples.code:
ALGORITHM IfStatement
INPUT: age
OUTPUT: eligibility

BEGIN
 IF age >= 18 THEN
 PRINT 'You are eligible to vote'
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a simple if statement that checks if a person is eligible to vote based on their age.
